title: TDS Return Filing Service Mumbai | Virtual Auditor — CA V. Viswanathan
description: TDS return filing in Mumbai. 24Q, 26Q, 27Q quarterly filings. Form 16/16A, TRACES management. Avoid penalties. Call +91-77000 89597.
bodyText:
Looking for TDS return filing in Mumbai? Virtual Auditor handles complete TDS compliance in Mumbai, led by CA V. Viswanathan (FCA). Monthly computation, quarterly filing, Form 16/16A, and TRACES management for businesses of all sizes.

What is TDS Return Filing Service Mumbai | Virtual Auditor — CA V. Viswanathan?

  HEADING2: What We Deliver
  Quarterly TDS return preparation and filing — 24Q, 26Q, 27Q, 27EQ. Monthly TDS computation covering all payment types — salary (192), interest (194A), contractors (194C), professionals (194J), rent (194I), commission (194H), and foreign payments (195). Challan preparation with correct BSR code, section, and assessment year. Form 16 (annual salary certificate) and Form 16A (quarterly non-salary certificates) from TRACES. Lower deduction certificate (Section 197) applications. TDS default resolution — demand matching, interest computation, and rectification filing. TRACES registration, login management, and statement download.
  HEADING2: Why Choose Virtual Auditor for TDS Filing in Mumbai
  Mumbai businesses handle high-volume payments across multiple TDS sections. Trading companies deduct TDS on brokerage, commission, and rent. Real estate firms handle TDS on property purchase (194IA) and rent (194I). Service companies deduct on professional fees and foreign vendor payments. Each requires correct section, rate, and threshold application. Virtual Auditor handles all of this systematically, preventing the defaults and demands that arise from incorrect TDS classification. Our Goregaon West office provides in-person support.
  HEADING2: Our Process
  Step 1: Monthly payment review and TDS computation. Step 2: Challan preparation and deposit before 7th of the month. Step 3: Quarterly return preparation with PAN validation. Step 4: Filing and processing status monitoring on TRACES. Step 5: Form 16/16A generation. Step 6: Year-end reconciliation and correction statements.
  HEADING2: Get Started Today
  Need TDS return filing in Mumbai? Contact us:
  Call/WhatsApp: +91-77000 89597
  Email: support@virtualauditor.in
  Visit: Workafella, AK Estate, SV Road, Goregaon West, Mumbai 400062

Virtual Auditor provides comprehensive income tax services under the Income Tax Act, 1961. Our practice covers individual, corporate, and trust taxation with focus on compliance, planning, and dispute resolution.

The engagement includes: assessment of taxable income and applicable deductions, preparation and filing of income tax returns, advance tax computation and payment assistance, response to notices and assessment proceedings, appellate representation before CIT(A) and ITAT, and strategic tax planning within the legal framework.

Our approach combines technical expertise with practical business understanding. Led by CA V. Viswanathan (FCA), our team serves clients across Chennai, Bangalore, Mumbai, and throughout India.

faqs.q: What are the TDS deposit due dates?
faqs.a: TDS must be deposited by 7th of the following month (e.g., March TDS by 7 April). For March deductions, the due date is 30 April. Government deductors can deposit on the same day. Late deposit attracts interest at 1.5% per month.

faqs.q: Can you handle TDS for a company with 100+ employees?
faqs.a: Yes. We handle payroll TDS for companies with large workforces — computing employee-wise TDS u/s 192 based on declared investments, processing Form 12BB, and generating individual Form 16 for each employee.

faqs.q: How much does TDS return filing cost in Mumbai?
faqs.a: Quarterly TDS filing starts from Rs 2,000 per return. Pricing depends on number of deductees, return types (24Q/26Q/27Q), and whether monthly TDS computation is included. Contact +91-77000 89597 for a package quote.
